steps.title: Use the alteration clue
steps.content: The next sentence says maples may undergo relatively small, easy alterations in response to climate change. The blank therefore needs a phrase for adjusting to changed conditions.

steps.title: Reject illogical phrases
steps.content: Choice A suggests moving away from climate changes, not adjusting to them. Choice B means mention or consult. Choice C means come from, which does not fit how trees respond to changing climate.

steps.title: Choose the adjustment phrase
steps.content: Adapt to means adjust to new conditions, matching the passage's claim that maples may handle climate changes better than some other trees. The answer is D.
